animations.description: Voice note waveform pulses during recording
animations.css: .animotion-voice-note span { display: inline-block; width: 3px; height: 15px; background: #3b82f6; margin: 0 1px; animation: animotion-voiceNote 0.8s ease-in-out infinite; }
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-voiceNote { 0%, to { height: 5px; } 50% { height: 20px; } }

animations.name: Read Receipt
animations.description: Read receipt checkmarks appear sequentially
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-readReceipt { from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.5); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); color: #3b82f6; } }

animations.name: Group Avatar
animations.description: Group avatar thumbnails stack with overlap animation
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-groupAvatar { from { transform: translateX(-10px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } }

animations.name: Profile Pop
animations.description: Profile card pops open with scale and shadow
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-profilePop { from { transform: scale(0.8); opacity: 0; } to { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); } }

animations.name: Feed Refresh
animations.description: Feed content refreshes with pull-down indicator
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-feedRefresh { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

animations.name: Infinite Scroll
animations.description: Loading indicator for infinite scroll at bottom
animations.css: .animotion-infinite-scroll span { display: inline-block; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #94a3b8; animation: animotion-infiniteScroll 1s ease-in-out infinite; }
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-infiniteScroll { 0%, to { opacity: 0.3; } 50% { opacity: 1; } }

animations.name: Content Load
animations.description: Content placeholder loads with shimmer effect
animations.css: .animotion-content-load { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f0f0f0 25%, #e0e0e0 50%, #f0f0f0 75%); background-size: 200% 100%; animation: animotion-contentLoad 1.5s linear infinite; }
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-contentLoad { from { background-position: 200% 0; } to { background-position: -200% 0; } }

animations.name: Chart Line Draw
animations.description: Line chart draws from left to right with stroke animation
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-chartLineDraw { from { clip-path: inset(0 100% 0 0); } to { clip-path: inset(0 0 0 0); } }

animations.name: Chart Bar Grow
animations.description: Bar chart bars grow from baseline upward
animations.css: .animotion-chart-bar-grow { animation: animotion-chartBarGrow 0.8s ease-out both; transform-origin: bottom; }
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-chartBarGrow { from { transform: scaleY(0); } to { transform: scaleY(1); } }

animations.name: Chart Pie Fill
animations.description: Pie chart fills with conic gradient rotation
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-chartPieFill { from { background: conic-gradient(#3b82f6 0deg, #e5e7eb 0deg); } to { background: conic-gradient(#3b82f6 270deg, #e5e7eb 270deg); } }

animations.name: Chart Donut Fill
animations.description: Donut chart ring fills with animated arc
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-chartDonutFill { from { background: conic-gradient(#3b82f6 0deg, transparent 0deg); } to { background: conic-gradient(#3b82f6 240deg, transparent 240deg); } }

animations.name: Gauge Needle
animations.description: Gauge needle sweeps to target value
animations.css: .animotion-gauge-needle { animation: animotion-gaugeNeedle 1s ease-out both; transform-origin: bottom center; }
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-gaugeNeedle { from { transform: rotate(-90deg); } to { transform: rotate(45deg); } }

animations.name: Sparkline
animations.description: Mini sparkline chart draws from left to right
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-sparkline { from { clip-path: inset(0 100% 0 0); } to { clip-path: inset(0 0 0 0); } }

animations.name: Heatmap Pulse
animations.description: Heatmap cell pulses with intensity color change
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-heatmapPulse { 0%, to { opacity: 0.5; } 50% { opacity: 1; } }

animations.name: Treemap Expand
animations.description: Treemap block expands to show detail on click
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-treemapExpand { from { transform: scale(0.8); opacity: 0; } to { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } }

animations.name: Scatter Plot
animations.description: Scatter plot dots appear with staggered pop-in
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-scatterPlot { from { transform: scale(0); opacity: 0; } to { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } }

animations.name: Radar Sweep
animations.description: Radar chart sweeps with rotating line indicator
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-radarSweep { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

animations.name: Funnel Fill
animations.description: Funnel chart sections fill from top to bottom
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-funnelFill { from { transform: scaleX(0); opacity: 0; } to { transform: scaleX(1); opacity: 1; } }

animations.name: Waterfall Step
animations.description: Waterfall chart blocks step in sequentially
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-waterfallStep { from { transform: translateY(10px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } }

animations.name: Bubble Chart
animations.description: Bubble chart circles scale in with stagger
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-bubbleChart { from { transform: scale(0); } to { transform: scale(1); } }

animations.name: Network Node
animations.description: Network graph node appears with connection pulse
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-networkNode { from { transform: scale(0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(59,130,246,0.4); } to { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(59,130,246,0); } }

animations.name: Timeline Reveal
animations.description: Timeline items reveal with staggered slide-in
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-timelineReveal { from { transform: translateX(-20px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } }

animations.name: KPI Counter
animations.description: KPI number counts up from zero to target value
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-kpiCounter { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

animations.name: Metric Card
animations.description: Metric card slides in with value highlight
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-metricCard { from { transform: translateY(15px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } }

animations.name: Alert Blink
animations.description: Alert indicator blinks to draw attention
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-alertBlink { 0%, to { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0; } }

animations.name: Status Change
animations.description: Status badge transitions color for state change
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-statusChange { from { background-color: #f59e0b; transform: scale(0.8); } to { background-color: #10b981; transform: scale(1); } }

animations.name: Data Refresh
animations.description: Data refresh indicator spins while loading new data
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-dataRefresh { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

animations.name: Table Row Slide
animations.description: Table rows slide in from the right sequentially
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-tableRowSlide { from { transform: translateX(20px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } }

animations.name: Grid Cell Pop
animations.description: Dashboard grid cell pops into place with scale
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-gridCellPop { from { transform: scale(0.8); opacity: 0; } to { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } }

animations.name: Widget Expand
animations.description: Dashboard widget expands to show full content
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-widgetExpand { from { max-height: 100px; opacity: 0.5; } to { max-height: 500px; opacity: 1; } }

animations.name: Panel Slide
animations.description: Dashboard panel slides in from the edge
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-panelSlide { from { transform: translateX(-100%); } to { transform: translateX(0); } }

animations.name: Dashboard Load
animations.description: Full dashboard layout loads with staggered widget reveals
animations.keyframeCSS: @keyframes animotion-dashboardLoad { from { transform: translateY(20px) scale(0.95); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0) scale(1); opacity: 1; } }
